citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: A neuron's weights start out as small random values and evolve to a more precise pattern through learning. The changes in the neuron's weights are computed by a learning rule driven by a back-propagated error signal.
